header.description: Let us know if you have any questions or suggestions. Our team is ready to help you.

info.responseTime: We usually reply to all messages within <highlight>24 hours</highlight>.

hero.title: Building <highlight>Unity</highlight> through Blood Ties, We are Tomorrow's Reliable <highlight>Humanity</highlight>
hero.description: <bold>Rokto Din</bold> is a modern and transparent online blood donation platform in Bangladesh. Our goal is to bridge the gap between donors and recipients through technology and ensure rapid blood supply for every critical patient.

why.title: A Unique Fusion of Technology and <highlight>Humanity</highlight>
why.description: <bold>Rokto Din</bold> is not just a website; it's an ecosystem designed to save lives through data accuracy and speed. We believe in direct action, reducing the long wait times of traditional social media posts.

database.title: Smart Campus Database
database.desc: A vast network of thousands of verified donors from the country's top universities and colleges.

privacy.title: Data Privacy & Security
privacy.desc: Protecting donor personal information is our top priority. No third-party access allowed.

location.title: Location-Based Instant Search
location.desc: Find blood donors in your nearby area within seconds by filtering through divisions and districts.

support.title: 24/7 Emergency Support
support.desc: Our community and volunteer team are always ready to stand by you in times of urgent need.

zihan.name: MD. Zihaul Islam Zihan
zihan.desc: As a CSE student, he is the architect behind the site's complete technical infrastructure and user experience.

emtiaz.name: Fazle Rabbi Emtiaz
emtiaz.desc: He is the mastermind behind platform promotion, donor engagement, and strengthening the community network.

free.label: Free Service
free.desc: A completely humanitarian initiative with no hidden charges.

active.label: Active Network
active.desc: Ready to respond instantly at any moment, day or night.

verified.label: Donor List
verified.desc: Every piece of data is strictly verified and secured.

cta.title: Let's Stand as a <highlight>Shield</highlight> in Times of Crisis
cta.description: Your one-minute decision can be the reason for someone's lifetime of smiles. Register your name in Bangladesh's fastest blood donor network today.

metadata.title: Find Blood Donors | Rokto Din
metadata.description: Use Rokto Din to find blood donors quickly in your area. Donate blood to save lives.

header.title: Find <highlight>Blood Donors</highlight> in Your Area
header.description: Finding a blood donor in an emergency is now easier. Search for trusted blood donors near you in our database.

header.title: <highlight>Rokto Din</highlight> is With You to Save Lives
header.description: We provide a fast and secure platform between blood donors and recipients, helping to reduce risks in emergencies.

search.title: Find Donors Easily
search.desc: Find the nearest donor within seconds based on your area and blood group.

join.title: Join as a Donor
join.desc: Your small donation can save a life. Register as a donor in our community today.

secure.title: Safe & Trusted
secure.desc: We verify donor information and build a bridge between donors and recipients while maintaining privacy.

metadata.title: Blood Donation Date Calculator | Rokto Din
metadata.description: Check blood donation eligibility in seconds with Rokto Din. Enter your last donation date and get your next available donation date based on a 2-month interval.
metadata.keywords: blood donation date calculator, donor eligibility checker, next blood donation date, blood donation 2 month rule, Rokto Din
metadata.ogDescription: Find out if you can donate now and see your next blood donation date with Rokto Din's 2-month eligibility calculator.

hero.title: Check Your Next <highlight>Blood Donation Date</highlight>
hero.description: Enter your last blood donation date to instantly know whether you are available for donation and when your next donation date starts.

form.cardDescription: This calculator checks your donor availability against a 2-month waiting period and gives your next available date.
form.hint: If 2 months or more have passed since your last donation, you are considered available.
form.availableMessage: You can donate blood now based on the 2-month rule.
form.notAvailableMessage: You need to wait <highlight>{days}</highlight> more day(s).

validation.empty: Please select your last donation date.
validation.future: Last donation date cannot be in the future.

seo.title: Why Use a <highlight>Blood Donation Date Calculator</highlight>?
seo.description: A clear donation timeline helps donors stay safe and ready. Check eligibility before responding to urgent blood requests.

rule.title: Tracks the 2-Month Rule
rule.description: Automatically calculates your next eligible date from the last donation date.

safety.title: Supports Safer Donations
safety.description: Helps you avoid donating too early and follow a healthier donation interval.

planning.title: Better Emergency Planning
planning.description: Know when you can respond to blood requests and plan your donation schedule.

expanded.title: Complete Donation Eligibility Guide for Better Planning
expanded.intro: Using a blood donation date calculator improves your donation consistency, protects your health, and helps you respond quickly when someone needs blood in an emergency.

consistency.title: Consistent Donation Planning
consistency.description: Track your next blood donation date without guessing and maintain a safe donation routine.

preparedness.title: Emergency Readiness
preparedness.description: Know your eligibility in advance so you can react faster to urgent blood requests.

safetyFirst.title: Donor Health First
safetyFirst.description: Following a proper 2-month interval supports safer donation timing for regular donors.

communityImpact.title: Stronger Donor Community
communityImpact.description: When donors track availability accurately, blood matching and donor response become more reliable.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Donation Dates
faq.description: These common questions help new and regular donors understand how this blood donation date calculator works and why waiting periods matter.

calculation.question: How does this blood donation date calculator work?
calculation.answer: The calculator adds a 2-month interval to your last donation date and checks whether today is on or after that date.

available.question: When am I considered available to donate blood again?
available.answer: You are considered available when at least 2 months have passed since your last blood donation date.

future.question: Can I enter a future date as my last donation date?
future.answer: No. Future dates are blocked because your last donation date must be a real past or current date.

newDonor.question: Can new donors use this donation date tool?
newDonor.answer: Yes. New donors can still review the eligibility rule and then register as a blood donor on Rokto Din.

waitReason.question: Why do I need to wait 2 months between donations?
waitReason.answer: A 2-month interval helps your body recover blood volume and supports safer donation timing for regular donors.

afterEligible.question: What should I do after becoming eligible?
afterEligible.answer: If you are eligible today, you can respond to urgent blood requests, find nearby recipients, or keep your donor profile updated.

cta.title: Need blood urgently or want to help?
cta.description: Find nearby donors immediately or register yourself to join the Rokto Din blood donor network.

HeroBanner.description: Donating blood is a noble act. Your small donation can save a precious life. Find donors easily through the <highlight>Rokto Din</highlight> app.

FindDonor.title: Find Blood Donors <highlight>In Your Area</highlight>
FindDonor.subtitle: Get donor information quickly by filling out the form below

intro.title: Why Donate Blood and <highlight>Its Importance</highlight>
intro.description: Blood donation is not just a humanitarian act; it is a life-saving measure. One bag of your blood can save the life of an accident victim, a thalassemia patient, or a mother facing complications during childbirth.

health.title: Health Benefits
health.desc: Regular blood donation maintains iron balance in the body. It helps reduce the risk of heart disease and cancer.

cells.title: New Blood Cells
cells.desc: After donating blood, the body produces new blood cells, which increases immunity and vitality.

mind.title: Mental Satisfaction
mind.desc: The spiritual peace of saving a dying person's life cannot be found through any other work.

list.age: Age must be between 18 and 60 years.
list.weight: Weight must be at least 50 kg or more.
list.interval: At least 4 months must have passed since the last donation.

advice.title: What to Do Before & After Donation
advice.desc: It is important to eat nutritious food and drink enough water before donating blood. Rest for at least 10-15 minutes after donation and avoid heavy work for the next few hours. Your slight awareness will make the donation process easy and safe.

HomePageSEO.quote: "Your Blood, Someone Else's Power to Live"

heading.title: <highlight>How</highlight> We Work
heading.subtitle: Ensuring transparency and fast service is our main goal. Learn how we find blood donors for your needs.

collection.title: Campus Data Collection
collection.desc: We collect donor information directly from various colleges and universities across the country.

registration.title: Voluntary Registration
registration.desc: Anyone can create an account and become a donor by providing their name, address, and contact info.

verification.title: Data Verification
verification.desc: Our team carefully verifies every donor's information before listing it on the website.

search.title: Easy Donor Search
search.desc: Contact the desired blood donor directly within a few clicks during critical moments.

cta.title: Do you want to be a <highlight>Representative</highlight> of your campus?
cta.subtitle: Contact us to add your institution's donor list to our database.

Footer.moto: Voluntary blood donation saves lives. Our main goal is to build a bridge between blood donors and recipients. One bag of your blood can give a new life.

errors.dateEmpty: Donation date can not be empty
errors.dateInvalid: Must be a valid date string (YYYY-MM-DD)
errors.hospitalEmpty: Hospital name can not be empty
errors.bagsInvalid: Units donated must be a number

status.error: Failed to create donation record. Please try again.
status.futureDate: Donation date cannot be in the future. Please select today or a past date.
status.olderOrSameDate: Donation date must be later than your last donation date ({date}). Older or same-date entries are not allowed.
status.withinTwoMonths: You cannot add a new donation within 2 months of your last donation. Last donation was on {lastDate}. Next allowed date is {nextDate}.
